name: MESIAL TEMPORAL SCLEROSIS

demographics.Histo: marked neuronal loss + astrogliosis in hippocampal subfields CA1 + CA3 + CA4

dominant_finding: hippocampal atrophy + loss of internal architecture
discriminating_features: hippocampal atrophy + loss of internal architecture

general: hippocampal atrophy + loss of internal architecture
increased SI of anterior temporal lobe cortex (38%)
